content:
# Recommendations — after iter-069

## HIGH — effort-break c.2 (the now-stated, now-reduced dual cocycle)
`presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` is STATED + sectionwise-reduced; residual is the exact dual of
how `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` proves. Effort-break into the two fresh sub-lemmas the prover pinned
(do NOT re-assign c.2 flat — the per-open crux does not supply either):
- **(a) H1 = `leftAdjointUniq` cocycle** — `H1_{h≫f}.symm` factors through `pullbackComp φR_f φR_h`,
  `(pullback φR_h)(H1_f.symm)`, `H1_h.symm`, `restrictFunctorComp h f`. Dual-flank analogue of the root's
  `conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv` / Mathlib `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv`. Try
  `Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso`.
- **(b) `sliceDualTransport` composition law** over `image_preimage_of_le` for `h ≫ f` (relating
  `sliceDualTransport (h≫f) M` to the `f`- and `h`-instances reindexed across `f.opensFunctor`/`h.opensFunctor`).
Both are mate/pseudofunctoriality computations parallel to the proven tensor flank — there IS a template.

## HIGH — blueprint reconcile (lvb-checker major; becomes MUST-FIX on sorry-close)
Dispatch blueprint-writer on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:presheafdual_pullback_comparison_restrict`:
- Leg-4 of the displayed cocycle says `dual((pullbackComp j ι_U).hom)`; the realized Lean routes leg-4
  through `dualIsoOfIso((forget Z.ringCatSheaf).mapIso((restrictFunctorComp h f).app M))` — reconcile the
  displayed formula to the realized `restrictFunctorComp` route (the `pushforwardComp` form whnf-bombs and
  is a dead end — record that).
- `\uses` set (L7820) missing edges for `restrictFunctorComp` (Mathlib anchor — consider a `\mathlibok`
  anchor block) and for leg-1's `pullbackComp`.
This is currently 0-must-fix ONLY because the proof is still `sorry`; the moment a prover closes it without
reconciling, it escalates. Fix the blueprint BEFORE the (a)+(b) proofs land.

## MEDIUM — auditor style fixes on c.2 (do at next prover touch of the file)
- L550 `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` — fragile under transparency changes; add a
  one-line comment justifying it OR restructure the statement to name the RHS directly.
- L551 `set_option maxHeartbeats 3200000` — add the Mathlib-style explanatory comment (linter fires).

## MEDIUM — un-private bridge-(b) Sq1 (carried from iter-068, still live)
S3's bridge-(b) `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict` (TensorObjInverse.lean L1222, `sorry`) is a one-liner
blocked only because `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` (+2 tail helpers) is `private` in
`TensorObjSubstrate.lean`. Un-private / relocate (refactor subagent), then the one-liner closes. This is a
SEPARATE blocker from c.2 and can proceed in parallel — but it is a root-churning edit, so run SOLO
(PARALLEL-LANE BUILD RACE).

## BLOCKED — do NOT re-assign flat
- **c.2 `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict`** — needs (a)+(b) first (twice-confirmed reversal:
  iter-067 fired, iter-068 pinned, iter-069 reduced). Flat re-assignment will hit the same two-immersion
  pseudofunctoriality wall.
- **S3 / S4a** (TensorObjInverse.lean) — gated on c.2 (a)+(b) AND bridge-(b) Sq1. Do not re-assign until
  both land.
- **`pushforwardComp` at concrete `Scheme.presheaf` β** — whnf-bomb at any heartbeat budget. Route all
  Cone-B pseudofunctoriality through the light eqToHom `restrictFunctorComp`.

## Coverage debt (planner: author blueprint blocks)
- `evalLin_restrict_commute_aux` (PresheafDualPullback.lean L350, off-path `sorry` aux) — uncovered
  `lean_aux`. Off the critical path (part of the abandoned L1/L3a chain, scheduled for deletion); author a
  block OR delete the decl with its consumers.
- Pre-existing `lean_aux` debt (root helpers `comp_cancel_mid`, `cocycle_assemble`, `pullbackTensorMap_restrict_cancel`, etc.)
  remains — long-standing, low priority, surface only if it blocks DAG reasoning.

## Reusable patterns discovered
- **Inspect the Mathlib `def` before formalizing an abstract composite.** c.1 = `Iso.refl` because
  `restrictFunctor = SheafOfModules.pushforward`-on-`val` definitionally; the blueprint H1∘(RFIP;SCP)
  was unnecessary scaffolding.
- **Light eqToHom isos over heavy refl-defeq isos** for pseudofunctoriality legs: `restrictFunctorComp`
  builds clean where `pushforwardComp` at concrete β bombs.
